# ComplianceStack Launch Summary

## Repository Status

**GitHub:** https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack
**Release:** v2.0.0 (Initial Release)
**Tag:** v2.0.0

## What's Been Done

### Repository Optimization
- [x] Complete codebase (106 files, 17,517 lines)
- [x] Optimized README with badges and SEO
- [x] Community files (SECURITY.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [x] CHANGELOG.md with Keep a Changelog format
- [x] GitHub topics (20 keywords)
- [x] Repository description optimized
- [x] Launch kit with social media content

### Technical Implementation
- [x] 17 MCP tools implemented
- [x] TypeScript MCP server
- [x] Python FastAPI backend
- [x] Docker orchestration
- [x] CI/CD pipeline
- [x] W3C Verifiable Credentials
- [x] Zero data egress architecture
- [x] OAuth 2.1 + RBAC

## Key Messages

### Primary
"ComplianceStack is the first open-source MCP server that audits AI models against 5 regulatory frameworks in real-time."

### Secondary
- "Zero data egress - all operations run on-premise"
- "17-phase audit pipeline covering EU AI Act, GDPR, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, India DPDP Act"
- "Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf via MCP"
- "W3C Verifiable Credentials for cryptographically signed audit certificates"

### Hashtags
```
#AIGovernance #EUAIAct #GDPR #MCP #AICompliance 
#OpenSource #MachineLearning #LLM #AISafety 
#DataPrivacy #RegulatoryCompliance #NIST #ISO42001
```
